creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
It looks like this patch entirely removes support for existing PHP versions:

[pkg01 dan ~/ports/head/net-mgmt/nagiosql] % sudo make patch                                                                                                     17:20:31
===>  nagiosql-3.4.1 cannot be installed: doesn't work with lang/php74 port
(doesn't support PHP 7.4 81).
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/home/dan/ports/head/net-mgmt/nagiosql
